title: Improve Reports Loading UX for Large Repositories and Fix Missing Sidebar
story: As a user with a large number of reports, I want clear loading indicators and a functional navigation sidebar, so that I know data is being prepared and can navigate while waiting.
description:
Multiple issues with the reports page for clients with large report repositories:

1. **Loading lag**: No visual indicator while reports are being prepared for large datasets
2. **Missing sidebar**: Navigation sidebar not appearing (possibly cache-related)
3. **Users not loading**: User data not populating in the reports view
4. **Report completeness**: Some reports may not be fetched or searchable past a certain data size
acceptance_criteria: Loading indicator visible while reports are being prepared
User data loads in the reports view
All reports are fetchable and searchable regardless of repository size
ux_changes: Added loading indicator to notify users while report data is being prepared. Fixed navigation sidebar visibility.
middleware_changes: Fixed user loading issue in the reports view. Investigated report fetching completeness for large datasets.
implementation_notes: Left navigation issue may be cache-related as developer could not reproduce it locally. Loader added for data preparation notification. User loading issue fixed. Some reports from Cardiff instance not fetching in DTP — needs further investigation with larger accounts.
comment_summary: Developer could not reproduce the sidebar issue (suspected cache). Added a loader for report preparation. Fixed user loading issue. Flagged that some Cardiff reports were missing from the fetched list and requested a sync to investigate with larger datasets.
